suggestions.name: ArrayReverser
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit focused exclusively on reversing array elements in-place. They share identical algorithmic logic, consistent error handling, and operate on the same domain concept o

suggestions.name: PrimitiveArrayConverter
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit responsible for converting primitive arrays to their corresponding wrapper object arrays. They share common conversion logic, empty array constants, and array popula

suggestions.name: ArrayInspector
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit focused on inspecting and analyzing array properties without modification. They share common patterns for null-safe array analysis, length comparison, and ordering v

suggestions.name: ArrayElementRemover
